alt: High-resolution museum specimen of a large, downy juvenile wandering albatross chick
caption: Albatross chicks hatch as massive balls of fluffy white down and are fed rich stomach oil by their parents for nearly a year.
location: French National Museum of Natural History
acquisitionNotes: Pristine 6000x4500 archival photograph of juvenile chick specimen. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/94/Diomedea_exulans_pullus_Zooth%C3%A8que_MNHN.jpg
